name: PDF Documents
description: Printable invoice and order document generation.
author: Buyzilo

hooks.name: orders.invoice.route
hooks.description: Registers invoice document generation routes for buyer, admin, and vendor order views.

dataGovernance.retentionNote: PDF documents rely on live order data and do not currently own dedicated site-setting records.

dashboardWidgets.title: Document-ready orders
dashboardWidgets.subtitle: Open order operations and issue printable invoice documents.

migrations.description: Mark invoice template compatibility for upgraded installs.
